phase-plan.purpose: Ensure chat-authored changes serialize into production bundle outputs with canonical assets, not schema-only edits.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: chat `build_bundle` operation wired to bundle API and optional artifact downloads.

task.description: Add build operation to chat contract and execution layer.
Persist chat-authored schemas and content bindings into bundle build request payloads.

dod.criterion: Chat can trigger validated bundle build using current authoring state.
Bundle build path includes canonical assets via content bindings.

suggestion.gap: Requirements do not explicitly require bundle artifacts from chat-driven authoring actions.
suggestion.proposal: Add release requirement for chat-triggered bundle+manifest generation verification.
